info.title: AutoSend API
info.description: AutoSend REST API for managing email templates

get.description: Retrieves all templates for the authenticated project. Optionally filter by template type and limit the number of results.

post.description: Creates a new email template. Templates can be either transactional or marketing type, and built using code (HTML) or the visual builder.

get.description: Search templates by name, subject, or template ID with pagination support.
Retrieves a single template by its template ID.

put.description: Updates an existing template. All fields are optional — only provided fields will be updated.

delete.description: Soft deletes a template by its template ID. The template will no longer appear in listings or be usable for sending emails.

patch.description: Updates only the preview text (preheader) of a template. The preview text is automatically injected into the template HTML.
